hero.description:
The Digital Hansard Portal makes it easier for you to access official records of parliamentary debates through a more user-friendly platform. Search, read, and explore speeches and discussions in Parliament in a more detailed, simple, and fast way. With just one search, you can access records from the Senate, the House of Representatives, and the Special Chamber. Information is now at your fingertips.

 With Digital Hansard, the public can follow national developments, understand the issues being discussed, and gain a clearer understanding of the roles and views of their elected representatives.
hero.catchphrase: Digital Hansard - parliamentary information at your fingertips.

search_mp: Search for an MP speech time series
search_keywords: Search for any keywords or phrases
search_individual_mp: Search for MP and explore their speech count based on the timeline
search_mps: Search for any demographic of MPs
invalid_date: Please enter a valid date. The field is incomplete or has an invalid date.
today_or_earlier: Date must be today or earlier.
all_timeseries_title: Timeseries of “{{ keyword }}” for all parliamentary sittings
timeseries_mp: Timeseries of total words spoken by {{ mp }} in {{ house }}
timeseries_mps: Timeseries of total words spoken in {{ house }}
